Prettier never reaches a fixed point on this input. An own-line comment in the
index-signature key-type→`]` gap cannot settle which side of the `]` it belongs
on: it oscillates forever between `// d⏎]: number` (own-line comment kept inside
the brackets, value `:` rejoined) and `] // d⏎: number` (comment relocated after
`]`, value `:` pushed to its own line), flipping on every pass. No
prettier-anchored claim file (output_prettier.*, audit_signature.txt, variants) is
expressible. The validator live-verifies this claim (rule F5). tsv breaks the
bracket and keeps the comment where the author wrote it — on its own line before
`]`. See README.md and docs/conformance_prettier.md §Comment relocation.
